title: biscutella scaposa
intro: Biscutella scaposa, also known as Alpine Biscutella or Alpine Bisque, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Biscutella scaposa include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant, which may help to protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and teas, although its exact preparation and dosing are not well-documented.
